name: TOP to POP
description: Position and Active is a shortcut for P in RGB, and alpha is set to 1 for active pixels (pixels with a valid attribute value). The First RGBA Contains menu lets you treat the RGBA in different ways, including as depth maps, point clouds, height maps. Using Custom you specify which attribute and components you expect in the RGBA of the TOP, so max 4 could be P(0) Color(2) N(1) P(2). When you Use Dimension all pixels are active since the resolution matches the TOP When using the other modes you can end up with unused pixels (you have 40 points, fit to square gives you 7x7, so you end up with 9 unused pixels), alpha is only set to 1 for used pixels.

parameters.name: First RGBA Contains
parameters.label: First RGBA Contains
parameters.description: Determines how the TOP's pixels should be interpreted.

parameters.name: Max Number of Points
parameters.label: Max Number of Points
parameters.description: Enable the setting of the max number of points when First RGBA Contains is set to Position.

parameters.name: TOP
parameters.label: TOP
parameters.description: Start of Sequential Parameter Blocks for TOPs to convert.

parameters.name: Connectivity
parameters.label: Connectivity
parameters.description: Determines the primitive used to connect the points.

parameters.name: Line X/Y/Z
parameters.label: Line X/Y/Z
parameters.description: Specifies whether to enable Lines in the X/Y/Z axis.

parameters.name: Plane XY/YZ/ZX
parameters.label: Plane XY/YZ/ZX
parameters.description: Plane orientation.

parameters.name: Unique Points
parameters.label: Unique Points
parameters.description: Enable not sharing points between primitives.

parameters.name: Center
parameters.label: Center
parameters.description: The center of the output geometry.

parameters.name: Override Size
parameters.label: Override Size
parameters.description: When on, overrides the automatic size, which is 1 in X with the size in Y respecting the input TOP aspect ratio.

parameters.name: Size
parameters.label: Size
parameters.description: The geometry 3D size.

parameters.name: Override Resolution
parameters.label: Override Resolution
parameters.description: When on, overrides the automatic resolution, which is the input TOP resolution.

parameters.name: Resolution
parameters.label: Resolution
parameters.description: Overriden resolution.

parameters.name: Pixel Sampling Location
parameters.label: Pixel Sampling Location
parameters.description: Sets where the pixels are sampled.

parameters.name: Texture Coordinates
parameters.label: Texture Coordinates
parameters.description: Sets the attribute class where the texture coordinates should be created.

parameters.name: Append Dimension
parameters.label: Append Dimension
parameters.description: Always add a dimension, or only add a dimesion when its size is 2 or more.

parameters.name: Rerange from Low High
parameters.label: Rerange from Low High
parameters.description: Range for input values.

parameters.name: Rerange to Low High
parameters.label: Rerange to Low High
parameters.description: Range for output values.

parameters.name: Camera
parameters.label: Camera
parameters.description: Specify the camera component.

parameters.name: Override Camera View
parameters.label: Override Camera View
parameters.description: When on, overrides the View settings from the selected camera object.

parameters.name: View Angle Method
parameters.label: View Angle Method
parameters.description: Sets the method to convert the depth TOP.

parameters.name: FOV Angle
parameters.label: FOV Angle
parameters.description: Determines the camera's field of view angle.

parameters.name: Optical Center (Cx, Cy)
parameters.label: Optical Center (Cx, Cy)
parameters.description: The location of the center of the camera for the depth projection.

parameters.name: Delete Near Points
parameters.label: Delete Near Points
parameters.description: Enable removal of points that are close to the camera.

parameters.name: Near Depth
parameters.label: Near Depth
parameters.description: Depth of the near clipping plane.

parameters.name: Delete Far Points
parameters.label: Delete Far Points
parameters.description: Enable removal of points that are far from the camera.

parameters.name: Far Depth
parameters.label: Far Depth
parameters.description: Depth of the far clipping plane.

parameters.name: Line Strip Behavior
parameters.label: Line Strip Behavior
parameters.description: What to do when points of a line strip are deleted.

parameters.name: Displacement Scale
parameters.label: Displacement Scale
parameters.description: Sets the displacement scale when the pixels are interpreted as heights values
